steps.title: Identify the radius value
steps.content:
A circle equation has this form:
$$(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2$$
For circle A, the right side is $7$, so the radius squared is $7$.

steps.title: Use the same radius
steps.content: Circle B has the same radius as circle A. Translating the circle changes the center, but it does not change the radius, so in circle B's equation, $a=7$.

steps.title: Multiply by four
steps.content:
The question asks for $4a$:
$$4a=4\cdot 7=28$$
The answer is 28.
